description: NVDA default baseline with 60d plus12/minus6 drop-neutral label
keep-all binary did not beat the default baseline
60d plus10/minus5 collapsed toward an all-positive model and is not usable
60d plus15/minus8 is the best label sweep result so far
atr_pct_20 is the strongest single extra feature on the 60d plus15/minus8 label

rolling_vol_60 is now wired into the standard train path and behaves cleanly, but it still trails atr_pct_20
rs_vs_benchmark_60 versus QQQ was clean but weaker than atr_pct_20 on NVDA

neg_weight 1.30 on atr_pct_20 improved little and still trailed the 3-feature combo
